name: HR Benefits Assistant
description: Helps employees navigate benefits enrollment, PTO policies, and compensation questions using your company's HR knowledge base.
overview:
The HR Benefits Assistant is a conversational agent designed to help employees quickly find answers about their benefits package, PTO policies, health insurance options, 401k matching, and other compensation-related questions.

It connects to your SharePoint-hosted HR knowledge base and provides accurate, policy-specific answers rather than generic information. Employees can ask about open enrollment deadlines, compare health plan options, check their PTO balance process, and understand vesting schedules.

Built for mid-to-large enterprises with complex benefits structures where HR teams are overwhelmed with repetitive questions.
instructions:
You are an HR Benefits Assistant for our organization. Your role is to help employees understand their benefits, PTO policies, and compensation packages.

Rules:
1. Always cite the specific policy document when answering
2. Never make up benefits information — if unsure, direct the employee to HR
3. Be empathetic and professional
4. For sensitive topics (termination, disability), provide the information but suggest scheduling a call with HR
5. Format responses with clear headers and bullet points for readability
6. If the employee asks about something outside HR scope, politely redirect them
author: evpeaire

topics.name: Benefits Overview
topics.description: Provides a summary of all available benefits packages
topics.yamlContent:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnRecognizedIntent
  id: benefitsOverview
  intent:
    triggerQueries:
      - What benefits do we offer
      - Tell me about our benefits
      - Benefits overview
  actions:
    - kind: SendActivity
      id: sendBenefits
      activity:
        text: |
          Here's an overview of your benefits package:
          
          **Health Insurance**: Medical, Dental, Vision
          **Retirement**: 401k with 6% match
          **Time Off**: 20 days PTO + 10 holidays
          **Wellness**: $500 annual wellness stipend
          
          Which benefit would you like to learn more about?

topics.name: PTO Balance & Requests
topics.description: Helps employees check PTO policies and request time off
topics.yamlContent:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnRecognizedIntent
  id: ptoRequest
  intent:
    triggerQueries:
      - How do I request PTO
      - What is our PTO policy
      - How many vacation days do I have
  actions:
    - kind: Question
      id: ptoType
      prompt: What type of time off are you looking for?
      variable: Topic.ptoType
      choices:
        - Vacation
        - Sick Leave
        - Personal Day
        - Parental Leave

topics.name: Health Insurance Comparison
topics.description: Compares available health plan options side by side
topics.yamlContent:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnRecognizedIntent
  id: healthCompare
  intent:
    triggerQueries:
      - Compare health plans
      - Which health plan should I choose
      - Health insurance options
  actions:
    - kind: SendActivity
      id: sendComparison
      activity:
        text: |
          We offer three health plans:
          
          | Plan | Monthly Cost | Deductible | Coverage |
          |------|-------------|------------|----------|
          | Basic | $150 | $2,000 | 70% |
          | Standard | $300 | $1,000 | 85% |
          | Premium | $500 | $500 | 95% |
          
          Would you like details on any specific plan?

tools.name: SharePoint HR Knowledge Base
tools.description: Searches the HR SharePoint site for policy documents, benefit guides, and FAQ articles

tools.name: Outlook Calendar
tools.description: Books meetings with HR representatives for complex benefit questions

powerAutomateFlows.name: PTO Request Submission
powerAutomateFlows.description: Submits a PTO request to the HR system and notifies the employee's manager for approval
powerAutomateFlows.purpose: Automates the PTO request workflow so employees can request time off directly through the agent

powerAutomateFlows.name: Benefits Enrollment Reminder
powerAutomateFlows.description: Sends personalized open enrollment reminders with deadline information
powerAutomateFlows.purpose: Ensures employees don't miss open enrollment windows

additionalSections.title: Prerequisites
additionalSections.content:
1. SharePoint site with HR knowledge base articles
2. HR system API access for PTO requests
3. Outlook connector configured for calendar booking
4. Admin access to Power Platform environment

additionalSections.title: Known Limitations
additionalSections.content:
- Cannot process actual payroll changes
- PTO balance lookup requires integration with your HRIS
- Benefits cost calculations are based on 2025 rates — update annually
